SourceLinks.Label: Personal Loan Eligibility Policy 2024 - Page 3
SourceLinks.Snippet: The applicant must be at least 18 years of age (19 in British Columbia, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Newfoundland and Labrador, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, and Yukon).

TraceabilitySummary: This rule was derived from 1 source document (Personal Loan Eligibility Policy 2024, page 3). The original text explicitly states a minimum age of 18, with provincial exceptions for provinces where the age of majority is 19.
